webinar.topic: Excel Career Masterclass - By Excel Bhaiya Abhishek

methodology.webinarLengthRule: Attendance calculations use webinar start time through webinar end because no chat was available.
methodology.courseRevealRule: Course reveal time fell back to 8:40 PM IST because no matching admin chat message was available.
methodology.stayedTillEndRule: Stayed till end means the final drop time was within 5 minutes of webinar end.
